overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a desert canyon at night. The character runs through rocky terrain past an abandoned camp with fire pits and approaches a large stone archway formation. The scene features cool blue moonlight with warm orange firelight accents from the camp.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with stone tower

agents.ego_description: running through desert canyon holding a weapon, moving away from stone tower

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows on the right side of the canyon
tall rocky canyon wall forming the left boundary
tall rocky canyon wall forming the right boundary

segments.scene_description: Character runs through an open desert canyon at night, passing a stone tower on the right. The terrain is sandy with sparse vegetation and steep rock cliffs on both sides under a clear starry sky.

events.description: approaching camp area with visible fire pits casting warm orange light

agents.ego_description: running past abandoned campfires and temporary structures scattered across the canyon floor

entered.detail: multiple glowing orange fire pits scattered across the camp area
small temporary tents and makeshift shelters

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and runs through an abandoned camp with glowing fire pits scattered across the canyon floor. Small temporary structures are visible near the fires, and the canyon walls draw closer on both sides.

events.description: slight turn to align with path toward large stone archway formation

agents.ego_description: continuing through narrowing canyon toward a massive natural stone archway

entered.detail: large natural rock archway bridging the canyon walls ahead

segments.scene_description: Leaving the camp behind, the character runs through a narrowing canyon section toward a massive natural stone archway that bridges the canyon walls ahead. The cliffs press closer on both sides as the archway grows larger in view.

events.description: entering the stone archway tunnel, sky becomes obscured by rock ceiling

agents.ego_description: running through the stone archway tunnel toward the light visible at the far exit

entered.detail: rock ceiling of the archway blocking the night sky
distant light visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character enters the stone archway, transitioning from open canyon to enclosed tunnel. The path continues through the rock formation toward a distant light at the exit, with the canyon walls now forming an enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon at night that gradually narrows into an enclosed stone passage. It begins with the character running through an open sandy expanse past a stone tower under a clear starry sky. As the path progresses, the scene shifts into an abandoned camp where glowing fire pits and temporary structures cast warm light against the encroaching canyon walls. The camera then follows the character through a tightening corridor of rock, moving toward a massive natural stone archway that looms larger in the frame. Finally, the movement carries the character through the archway, transitioning from the open air into a dark, enclosed tunnel that leads toward a distant light at the exit.
